title: Bump 1.7.2
body: First time trying to do the version bump with two commits in one PR.

comments.body:
~~LGTM~~
Thanks for the ping, @TomSweeneyRedHat. I let you merge :^)
I think we need to get https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/1450 in prior to releasing a new version. Currently, rootless Buildah is broken which seems like a big blocker.
I'm going to close this and do another PR so I can get #1450 included.
